name: ONE World Optimization Seminar
description: Weekly online seminar series covering optimization theory and applications. Attracts world-class speakers in mathematical programming, combinatorial optimization, and continuous optimization.

name: INFORMS Optimization Society Webinar
description: Monthly webinar series by the INFORMS Optimization Society featuring talks on advances in optimization research and practice.

name: MINOA Lectures
description: Seminar series on Mixed-Integer Nonlinear Optimization and Applications, run by the EU MINOA network.

name: EURO Webinars on OR
description: European Association of Operational Research (EURO) webinar series with talks by leading European OR researchers.

name: Gurobi Tech Talks
description: Technical talks from Gurobi Optimization covering solver features, modeling techniques, and real-world applications.

name: CPAIOR Summer School
description: Annual summer school on integration of constraint programming, AI, and operations research. Typically co-located with CPAIOR conference.

name: Aussois Combinatorial Optimization Workshop
description: Annual workshop in Aussois, France, focused on combinatorial optimization. Informal format with plenary and contributed talks.

name: IPCO Summer School
description: Summer school held before each IPCO conference, covering topics in integer programming and combinatorial optimization.
